'''âv-y-g-p''' ('''kavaygepoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:wellwish|wellwish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-y-g-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:wellwish|wellwish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âv-y-g-p
|-
! Lemma
| kavaygepoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thivaygepoko|thivaygepoko]] || [[word:jivaygepoko|jivaygepoko]] || [[word:shivaygepoko|shivaygepoko]] || [[word:kivaygepoko|kivaygepoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuvaygepoko|thuthuvaygepoko]] || [[word:jujuvaygepoko|jujuvaygepoko]] || [[word:shushuvaygepoko|shushuvaygepoko]] || [[word:kukuvaygepoko|kukuvaygepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thovaygepoko|thovaygepoko]] || [[word:jovaygepoko|jovaygepoko]] || [[word:shovaygepoko|shovaygepoko]] || [[word:kovaygepoko|kovaygepoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
